title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models with chains, tools, and RAG.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed "Open WebUI"); supports RAG, multimodal, admin panel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with chat history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline completions.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app using the Ollama JS client; useful starter template for web integrations.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run RAG pipeline combining Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for local document Q&A.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, async, and reactive (RxJava) APIs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook of recipes: function calling, vision, fine-tuning, Docker, Kubernetes, and more.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage options.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Lightweight Alpine-based multi-arch Docker image for Ollama (unofficial, often ahead of official).

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI (Tauri + React) for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Official docs on enabling CUDA GPU acceleration in Ollama Docker or bare-metal.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama answers into any channel with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local Ollama models into your workspace threads and DMs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-experts
summary: Curated list of community projects, Modelfiles, and tips for running Ollama effectively.
